create_versatile_gearbox.configuration.i: A list of items to log during common setup
create_versatile_gearbox.configuration.l: Whether to log the dirt block on common setup
create_versatile_gearbox.configuration.m: What do you want the magic number introduction to say
create_versatile_gearbox.ponder.shaft_co: All shafts are active by default
Right-click with a wrench to deactivate a shaft
After deactivation, this face no longer transmits power
Click again to reactivate the shaft
create_versatile_gearbox.ponder.versatil: Versatile Gearbox can transmit power and independently control each face's shaft
Gearbox can receive power input from any face
And transmit power to all other faces
Right-click a face with a wrench to toggle shaft state
